source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/04_G1717CW 외 7종/03_설계개발 출력/09_Label & Packaging/A-TCF-10-102_Labelling and packaging[G1417, G1717](Rev.01).docx

document.title: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For X-ray Detector
document.revisionOrVersion: Report No.: A-TCF-10-102 (rev.00); revision history lists Rev. 1

sourceSummary.oneLine: Labeling and packaging report for G1417 and G1717 series X-ray detectors covering product labels, packaging, symbols, and environmental limits.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports label and packaging design, domestic Korea and overseas labeling, shipment labeling, and symbol descriptions for the listed X-ray detector models.
keyPoints: Revision history lists Rev. 0 establishment on November/25/2024 and Rev. 1 on May 16, 2025 due to MFDS certification reflection and UDI modification.
Product labeling includes domestic use in Korea and overseas use label designs for G1417 and G1717 series detector labels, detector sub labels, and shipment labels.
Packaging sections define single unit packaging sizes, transport packaging contents, shipment label use, operating and storage environments, and symbol descriptions.

entities.name: MFDS
entities.evidence: Revision due to reflection of MFDS certification and UDI modification

concepts.name: Operating and storage environment
concepts.pageTarget: Medical Device Operating and Storage Environment

concepts.name: UDI modification
concepts.evidence: Revision due to reflection of MFDS certification and UDI modification

evidence.claim: The source is a proposed labeling and packaging document for an X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The document applies to G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.pageTarget: G1417 and G1717 X-ray Detector Models

evidence.claim: The report number is A-TCF-10-102 and the report line shows rev.00.
Revision history lists Rev. 0 dated November/25/2024 for establishment.
Revision history lists Rev. 1 dated May 16, 2025 due to MFDS certification reflection and UDI modification.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 May 16, 2025 Revision due to reflection of MFDS certification and UDI modification

evidence.claim: Product labeling includes label sizes for G1417 series detector label, G1717 series detector label, detector sub label, and shipment label.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417 Series Detector Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; G1717 Series Detector Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; Detector Sub Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; Shipment Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm

evidence.claim: Label design is separated into domestic Korea use and overseas use.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.1.2.1 For domestic use (Korea) ... 1.1.2.2 For overseas use

evidence.claim: Single unit packaging includes box, cushion, and master box items with specified dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: Single unit packaging size ... Box-Packing 1289mm * 882mm * 70 ... Master Box-Detector ve 580mm * 550mm * 215mm

evidence.claim: Transport packaging lists one power supply box packing, one battery packing, and one recharger packing.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Box Packing 1; Battery Packing 1; Recharger Packing 1

evidence.claim: Storage and transport temperature limits are -20 to 55 degrees Celsius.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Device Storage and Transport Conditions

evidence.claim: Operation temperature limits are 10 to 35 degrees Celsius.
The symbol description section includes medical device, WEEE, Type B applied part, and radio transmitting device markings.
evidence.evidenceText: TYPE B Applied part ... WEEE ... Medical device ... Marks it contains radio transmitting device.
